hero.headline: How we work, and who we work with.
hero.subheadline: Behind every project is a collaborative process shaped by curiosity, expertise, and a shared commitment to thoughtful architecture. Discover how our team brings ideas to life from concept to completion.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We begin by listening — understanding your vision, the site, and the story behind the project.

steps.title: Concept
steps.description: We translate ideas into early spatial concepts, exploring form, light, and material direction.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Concepts are refined into detailed architectural and interior design documentation.

steps.title: Construction
steps.description: We collaborate closely with contractors and consultants, providing guidance throughout construction to ensure the design is faithfully realized.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.description: The finished space is handed over, ready to be lived in, worked in, and experienced.

culture.headline: A studio shaped by curiosity and craft.
culture.body: At ORI, collaboration is at the heart of everything we do. We foster an open studio culture where curiosity, craftsmanship, and diverse perspectives come together to create architecture that is thoughtful, enduring, and deeply connected to its place.

inquiry.subheadline: Everything you need to know before starting your architectural journey with ORI Studio.

items.question: What types of projects does ORI Studio undertake?
items.answer: We design residential, hospitality, and commercial spaces, creating architecture that responds thoughtfully to its context, climate, and the people who experience it.

items.question: What services do you provide?
items.answer: We offer architecture design, interior design, landscape design, and project management, either as standalone services or combined into a full end-to-end package.

items.question: What is your minimum project size/budget?
items.answer: We take on projects of varying scale, though most residential commissions start from a mid-range budget. Share your estimated budget in the inquiry form and we'll advise honestly on fit.

items.question: What is your design process?
items.answer: Our process moves through five stages — Discovery, Concept, Design, Construction, and Deliver — with close collaboration at every step. You can read more on our Studio page.

items.question: How long does an architectural project take?
items.answer: Timelines vary by scale and complexity, but most residential projects take 12–18 months from initial concept to completed construction.

partnership.subheadline: What to expect when exploring a partnership or collaboration with ORI Studio.

items.question: What kinds of partnerships is ORI Studio open to?
items.answer: We welcome developer collaborations, vendor and supplier partnerships, media and press features, and co-design projects with other studios or consultants.

items.question: How long does it take to hear back on a partnership proposal?
items.answer: We typically review and respond to partnership inquiries within 5–7 business days.

items.question: Do you work with international partners?
items.answer: Yes — while our studio is based in Bali, we regularly collaborate with developers, vendors, and consultants based outside Indonesia.

items.question: What do you look for in a co-design collaboration?
items.answer: Shared values around craftsmanship, context-driven design, and a genuine willingness to collaborate rather than simply divide scope.

items.question: Can vendors and suppliers pitch products directly?
items.answer: Absolutely — select "Vendor & Supplier" in the partnership form and tell us about your product or material.

career.subheadline: Everything you need to know before applying to join the ORI Studio team.

items.question: How do I apply for an open position?
items.answer: Select the position you're interested in from the list above, fill out the career form with your details, and upload your CV as a PDF (max 5MB).

items.question: What should my portfolio include?
items.answer: A link to a portfolio (PDF, website, or Behance/Instagram) that showcases your relevant work — the more context on your role in each project, the better.

items.question: How long does the hiring process take?
items.answer: We aim to review applications within 2 weeks and will follow up directly if your background fits an open or upcoming role.

items.question: Do you offer remote or hybrid roles?
items.answer: Most of our roles are based in our Bali studio, though we occasionally consider remote arrangements for senior positions.

items.question: Do you accept applications when no position is open?
items.answer: Yes — feel free to submit your CV through the career form even if your ideal role isn't currently listed; we keep applications on file for future openings.

cta.eyebrow: Not Ready To Reach Out Yet?
cta.headline: See What We've Built So Far.
cta.subheadline: Take a look through our portfolio while you think it over — we'll be here when you're ready.
